description: AWS umbrella service prefixes that should be prefixed with 'aws' in canonical slugs. Example: 'lambda' → 'awslambda' to match user convention. Multi-word product IDs like 'bedrock-agentcore' are NOT umbrellas and keep their original form.

_metadata.note: Extensible list. Add IAM prefixes here when a service's slug should be 'aws<prefix>' instead of just '<prefix>'. Non-umbrella services (KMS, Bedrock AgentCore, etc.) are omitted — they use their IAM prefix directly.

examples.bedrock-agentcore: bedrock-agentcore (multi-word product ID, NOT an umbrella)
